about.paragraph1: I'm 23 years old and work as a frontend developer. I currently work on email marketing development, dealing with highly structured HTML/CSS interfaces with a focus on compatibility and performance.
about.paragraph2: My stack includes React, JavaScript, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS and API integration.
about.paragraph3Start: My goal is to evolve into a more solid frontend role in
about.paragraph3End: , deepening my experience in interfaces, usability and front-end architecture.
about.paragraph4: I'm in constant transition — moving away from a more technical and operational context towards an environment focused on product and user experience.

projects.title: Projects
